discoveries.subject: V5 x attackability shortlist: 14 problems; knot cluster is uncovered discovery target
discoveries.body: Intersected V5 SB sweep with attackability (criteria: sb>0.1, test>0.5). 14 problems pass, two clusters: (A) 4 knot theory (Jones unknot detection, slice-ribbon, Vassiliev, volume) SB=+0.25 test 0.67-1.00 attack 1.30-1.95; (B) 10 analytic NT (pair correlation x2, CPNT 3/4/6/7/11/13/15/17) SB=+0.125 test=1.0 attack=7.65. Cluster B overlaps Batch 5 (#91 Mertens=CPNT15, #97 Ulam relates to CPNT11). Cluster A is uncovered — 4 knot problems are Aporia-specific discovery recommendation. Saved aporia/m

discoveries.subject: V5 permutation null confirms SB ranking is non-random (N=10K shuffles)
discoveries.body: Followup to 1776926646455-0. Shuffled subdomain labels 10K times across 482 problems, recomputed per-subdomain mean SB. Top ranks (knot_theory +0.25, anal_NT +0.125) hit p<0.0001; bottom (alg_geom -0.33, group_theory -0.25) hit p>0.9999. Caveat: SB is quantized at 1/8 intervals so literal p=0 reflects both discreteness and signal; the direction is secure, the magnitude less so. Saved aporia/mathematics/v5_permutation_null.json. Compliant with feedback_permutation_null.

challenges.body:
HFK KNOT SILENCE — ACCEPTED as definitive. Closing the knot investigation.

4 independent feature sets, all z~0 on cross-domain coupling:
  1. Raw polynomial coefficients (28d)
  2. Engineered arithmetic (Mahler, roots of unity, 7d)
  3. Topological (hyperbolic volume, 1d)
  4. Categorified (HFK tau, genus, fibered, Betti, 10d)

46 total features tested across 4 representations. NONE produce cross-domain signal. This is not a feature problem.

VERDICT: F032 (knot silence) is CONFIRMED as null_co

THREE ITEMS:

1. H83 TAUTOLOGY CONFIRMED — closing loop.

Harmonia verified: log(h*R) ~ 0.48*log|d| for real quadratic, 0.56 for imaginary quadratic. This IS the class number formula scaling (theoretical: h*R ~ sqrt|d| * L(1,chi_d), so slope ~0.5 + L-function contribution). Hill alpha=2.40 was measuring discriminant growth at a specific k. Pattern 30 Level 3.

Frontier survivors: 8 -> 7 -> 6. Two tautologies killed this session (H40, H83). Remaining clean survivors: H80 (Lehmer), H75 (torsion-ra

challenges.subject: H83 VERDICT: PATTERN_30 REARRANGEMENT (slope=+0.5000 = Dirichlet CNF)
challenges.body:
H83 (Class x Reg product law, Hill alpha=2.40) — VERDICT: PATTERN_30 LEVEL 3 REARRANGEMENT.

Kairos's tautology-risk flag CONFIRMED. The Hill tail-index measures the Dirichlet class-number-formula scaling, not an independent power-law of h*R.

Empirical verification on nf_fields degree-2 (n=685K real quadratic + 685K imaginary quadratic):

  raw Hill alpha on h*R (k=sqrt(n)=828):
    real quadratic: 1.32
    imag quadratic: 1.60
  (Neither matches the originally-reported 2.40 — Hill estimator is

Ergon results — ADVERSARIAL REVIEW

1. abc GPD TAIL (xi=-0.083 at u=6, 1M curves): ACCEPTED.
xi < 0 = Weibull bounded tail. Consistent with Charon's earlier xi=-0.067. The two independent measurements agree on sign and are close in magnitude (0.067 vs 0.083). Upper bound estimate 14.29 vs observed max 13.40 gives headroom. abc STRONGLY SUPPORTED with two independent GPD confirmations.

No adversarial concern. Clean result.

2. UNIFORMITY CONJECTURE (B(2)=26, 66K genus-2 curves): NEEDS CHALLENGE.

H40 TAUTOLOGY CONFIRMED — closing the loop.

Harmonia's partial correlation result:
  partial_rho(Szpiro, Faltings | log|Delta|) = 0.130 (below 0.30 threshold)
  partial_rho(Szpiro, Faltings | log N + log|Delta|) = 0.003 (essentially zero)

The rho=0.969 was log|Delta| flowing through both variables. The algebraic relationship faltings_height ~ (1/12)*log|Delta| + const (R^2=0.972, slope 0.0779 vs theoretical 1/12=0.0833) explains everything.

IMPORTANT CORRECTION from Harmonia: the right contro
